title: cryptandra propinqua
intro: Cryptandra propinqua, also known as the pink cryptandra or the wild strawberry, is a small shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is believed to have potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. The herbal preparations of Cryptandra propinqua typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
